why_this_recipient: Brown led asset tracing and gatekeeper recovery for the Madoff SIPA Trustee, recovering billions across a global financial institution network. This is the exact recovery mechanic relevant to this matter — offshore fraud, non-debtor gatekeepers, asset tracing.
why_now: Matter involves Chinese-registered offshore entity and non-debtor gatekeeper recovery — directly parallels Brown's Madoff cross-border enforcement work.
practice_match: Post-judgment asset tracing, offshore fraud recovery, financial institution gatekeeper enforcement — highest structural match in batch.
economic_match: Baker has previously accepted complex fraud recovery mandates with contingency components. Cross-border fraud recovery is a stated specialty.
conflict_screen_note: No defense conflict signals. Brown's practice is plaintiff/trustee-side recovery.

v1_issues: Generic phrasing didn't anchor her specific Madoff SIPA principal role
v2_changes: Referenced Madoff SIPA principal role precisely

outreach_draft.subject: Post-Judgment Recovery — Offshore Entity — Gatekeeper Enforcement Assessment
outreach_draft.body:
Dear Ms. Brown,

I am writing directly regarding a post-judgment recovery matter that closely parallels the offshore fraud and non-debtor gatekeeper enforcement work your team has executed at scale.

Our client holds an unsatisfied fraud judgment against a Chinese-registered offshore corporation. Direct enforcement against the debtor is not viable. The recovery path we are assessing involves potential claims or leverage against non-debtor gatekeepers — auditors, financial institutions, and professional advisors whose role in the transaction or related conduct may warrant scrutiny.

The immediate objective is to assess whether viable recovery may be pursued against non-debtor gatekeepers, with early negotiated resolution preferred where feasible. The matter is only of interest if counsel sees a realistic path to material recovery against solvent non-debtor actors.

Your work as principal deputy to Irving Picard in the Madoff SIPA matter — tracing and recovering billions against a global network of financial institution gatekeepers — reflects the precise enforcement mechanics this matter requires. BakerHostetler's broader international asset tracing and offshore fraud recovery experience confirms strong structural alignment.

I would welcome a brief preliminary conversation. No commitment implied at this stage. Case details available upon request.

Kind regards,

Grant de Graf
CorporateXfactor
Special Situations / Post-Judgment Recovery

Website: corporatexfactor.com
Tel 212-444-1813
